name: NewJeans
description: NewJeans is a trendsetting K-Pop girl group known for their fresh, Y2K-inspired aesthetic and catchy music that blends various genres.

funFacts: Known for her mature, reliable leadership
Has a 'girl crush' image with soft personality
Trained for 5 years at HYBE before debut
Speaks fluent Japanese
Known for her powerful stage presence and duality
members.bio: Minji is NewJeans' leader despite being one of the youngest K-pop group leaders. Her mature personality and reliable nature earned her the leader position. She's known for her 'duality' - fierce on stage but adorable off-stage.

popularSongs.title: Attention
popularSongs.note: NewJeans' pre-debut single where Minji's opening verse set the group tone.

popularSongs.title: Hype Boy
popularSongs.note: Multi-MV debut track that anchored Minji's leader-as-center positioning.

popularSongs.title: Super Shy
popularSongs.note: Pre-release that became a global TikTok phenomenon.

popularSongs.title: Bubble Gum
popularSongs.note: Pre-release where Minji's vocal warmth carries the bossa-flavored hook.

members.distinction: Unlike other NewJeans members, Minji carries leader duties with an ESTJ's quiet operational discipline — her stage presence reads as composed front-line authority, which is why her lead lines often land before the choreography catches up.
members.fandomChant: Bunnies chant 'Kim Minji!' twice during her solo lines and synchronize light sticks to her opening note on Hype Boy.

funFacts: Born in Vietnam, raised in Melbourne, Australia
Only Vietnamese K-pop idol in a major group
Known for her adorable personality and reactions
Speaks Vietnamese, English, and Korean fluently
Her aegyo (cuteness) is legendary among fans
members.bio: Hanni is the Vietnamese-Australian member of NewJeans. Born in Vietnam and raised in Australia, she brings a unique multicultural perspective to the group. Her adorable personality and genuine reactions have made her a viral sensation.

popularSongs.title: Hype Boy
popularSongs.note: Hanni's pre-chorus is the part that broke through algorithm-wide.

popularSongs.title: Cool With You
popularSongs.note: Title track where Hanni's airy delivery anchors the verses.

popularSongs.title: OMG
popularSongs.note: Pre-release single with a viral choreography Hanni leads in dance practice clips.

popularSongs.title: Veronica Mars (cover)
popularSongs.note: Hanni's 'Sandy from Grease' viral cover that re-introduced her as a soloist online.

members.distinction: Unlike other NewJeans members, Hanni layers an INFP's earnest emotionality on top of Y2K bubblegum production — her ad-libs feel like personal asides, which is why her parts trend on short-form video faster than the choruses they sit in.
members.fandomChant: Bunnies chant 'Pham Hanni!' through her pre-choruses and respond to her 'I'm in love' line with a collective sing-along.

funFacts: Half Korean, half Australian
Known for her unique, versatile vocal color
The mood maker of the group
Went viral for her 'Hype Boy' pronunciation coaching
Has lived in both Korea and Australia
members.bio: Danielle is a half-Korean, half-Australian member known for her bright energy and unique vocal tone. She's the group's mood maker and her bilingual skills have made her popular in both Korean and international markets.

popularSongs.title: Ditto
popularSongs.note: Title track where Danielle's tone defines the nostalgic chorus.

popularSongs.title: Super Shy
popularSongs.note: Danielle's English ad-libs became the social-clip go-to for the song.

popularSongs.title: ETA
popularSongs.note: iPhone-shot MV title track that leans on Danielle's playful delivery.

popularSongs.title: How Sweet
popularSongs.note: Title track where Danielle's bright tone carries the hook.

members.distinction: Unlike other NewJeans members, Danielle's ENFP brightness shows up as bilingual code-switching mid-line — her English ad-libs land with native fluency, which is why her parts get clipped for global short-form first.
members.fandomChant: Bunnies chant 'Mo Danielle!' and often join her on the famous 'Ditto-yo' tag during live versions.

funFacts: Known for her cat-like visuals and personality
Very quiet and introverted off-stage
Her 'Cool With You' fancam went viral
Loves cats and has a pet cat
Her duality between performances is extreme
members.bio: Haerin is NewJeans' visual known for her striking cat-like features. Despite her quiet, introverted personality off-stage, she transforms into a powerful performer. Her mysterious aura has captivated fans worldwide.

popularSongs.title: Cool With You
popularSongs.note: Title track whose MV centered Haerin's gaze in the most-clipped scene.

popularSongs.title: OMG
popularSongs.note: Pre-release where Haerin's whisper hook became a fan-imitation moment.

popularSongs.title: Get Up (intro)
popularSongs.note: Short interlude that highlighted Haerin's lower-register restraint.

popularSongs.title: Right Now
popularSongs.note: Promotional single where Haerin's chorus tone reframes the song's tempo.

members.distinction: Unlike other NewJeans members, Haerin pairs ISTP coolness with a visual-heavy stage role — her stillness on camera does more work than choreography, which is why fan-cams of her standing still still trend.
members.fandomChant: Bunnies chant 'Kang Haerin!' three times during her solo lines and tend to hold breath during her close-ups in the MV cuts.

funFacts: Youngest K-pop idol in a major group (debuted at 14)
Already 170cm tall and still growing
Has a surprisingly mature rap style
Very playful and energetic despite being the youngest
Known for her unexpectedly deep voice
members.bio: Hyein is NewJeans' maknae who debuted at just 14 years old. Despite her young age, her rap skills and stage presence are remarkably mature. She's one of the tallest members and brings youthful energy to the group.

popularSongs.title: Hype Boy
popularSongs.note: Hyein's rap section gave the song its mid-track lift.

popularSongs.title: ASAP
popularSongs.note: Title track on Get Up where Hyein's bridge anchors the song's shift.

popularSongs.title: New Jeans (track)
popularSongs.note: Maknae-led cheerleader-themed track that became a stadium anthem.

popularSongs.title: Supernatural
popularSongs.note: Title with city-pop sheen where Hyein's bright tone lifts the chorus.

members.distinction: Unlike other NewJeans members, Hyein delivers main-rapper verses as the maknae — an INFP softness wrapped around surprisingly deep flow, which is why her short bars often steal the chorus credit from the singers.
members.fandomChant: Bunnies chant 'Lee Hyein!' through her rap section and pull out the puppy hand-sign during her solo lines.

seo.title: NewJeans Name Generator | Create Your Korean Name with Bunnies
seo.description: Create your NewJeans name with Minji, Hanni, Danielle, Haerin & Hyein! Instant chemistry scores & Korean names. Perfect for Bunnies fanfiction.
